creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: Let's put this bug to rest.  The commit that rmacklem made fixes a minor protocol nit, but isn't really the cause of the problem.  The root cause is an ESXi bug, not a FreeBSD bug.  Attachment 231735 works around the problem.  But it's such a hack that I don't want to commit it to FreeBSD.  Hopefully VMWare will fix their bug, and if not then hopefully Google will direct their users here.
